protocol.name: halo_shell_v1
protocol.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Halo DE Contributors MIT License

interface.name: halo_shell_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface allows a privileged client (the shell) to communicate with the compositor to request private APIs like locking the screen, displaying OSDs, or managing the dashboard.

entry.name: unauthorized
entry.summary: client is not authorized to use this interface

request.name: lock_screen
request.description: Signals the compositor to lock the screen, hide all user windows, and wait for the halo-greeter to unlock it.

request.name: show_dashboard
request.description: Instructs the compositor to blur the background and show the dashboard client on top of everything.

event.name: compositor_state_changed
event.description: Sent by the compositor when workspaces change or windows are moved.
